uplink.description: Measurement package (ct=3): P1 medium pressure, TOB1 water temp, PBaro/TBaro/Pd as extras
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js then converting to canonical units (P1 1.5 bar -> 150 kPa; PBaro 0.987 bar -> 98.7 kPa extra; Pd 0.513 bar -> 51.3 kPa extra; TOB1 14.25 C -> water.temperature.current; TBaro 22.5 C -> barometerTemperature extra). Channel set mirrors the upstream ct=3 example but with positive medium pressure so water.pressure >= 0.

uplink.description: Measurement package (ct=9): P1 pressure, TOB1 water temp, Conductivity Tc -> water.ec
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js then converting to canonical units (P1 2.013 bar -> 201.3 kPa; TOB1 18.6 C -> water.temperature.current; Conductivity Tc 1.413 mS/cm -> 1413 uS/cm).

uplink.description: Device-info package (fPort 4, func=12): battery + diagnostic extras
uplink._note: Input is the upstream info-message example; expected authored here (battery_voltage 5.083990... V -> battery 5.084; capacity % -> batteryPercent; enclosure humidity % -> enclosureHumidity; version/serial/datetime -> camelCase extras). Secondary frame: carries only battery/extras, no water.level/pressure (allowed; the measurement vectors cover the groundwater atLeastOne requirement).
